news.headline: SmartPM experiences substantial growth in 2024, doubling its size as Contech adoption skyrockets. #business #technology
Three Nashville developers collaborate to establish River District near North Bank with CET Holdings, E3 Construction Services, and Red Seal Homes.
news.summary: A partnership between Nashville's top developers CET Holdings, E3 Construction Services, and Red Seal Homes has been formed to create the River District in Nashville, Tennessee.

news.headline: HDI Global U.S. improves casualty underwriting leadership team in Chicago to boost presence in retail and wholesale markets.
news.summary: In Chicago, HDI Global has introduced a revamped leadership framework for its US casualty division to enhance its presence in both retail and wholesale sectors.

news.headline: Conti Federal Services, LLC earns 2025 Great Place To Work Certification™ for 4th consecutive year with 85% employee satisfaction - 28 points above U.S. average.
news.summary: Conti Federal Services, LLC in Orlando, FL has achieved certification from Great Place To Work® for the 4th consecutive year. This recognition is solely determined by feedback from current employees. An impressive 85% of employees at Conti Federal stated that it is indeed a great place to work, which is significantly higher than the average for U.S. companies by 28 points. Great Place To Work® is renowned globally for its expertise in workplace culture, employee experience, and leadership practices.

news.headline: TP-Link launches TL-WR3002X Wi-Fi 6 travel router with faster speeds and enhanced capacity for multiple devices.
news.summary: TP-Link Systems Inc., a prominent player in networking and smart home solutions, introduced its latest product, the TL-WR3002X, in Irvine, California. This premium Wi-Fi 6 travel router marks the company's advancement into the rapidly expanding travel router market, following the success of the TL-WR1502X. The TL-WR3002X offers advanced dual-band Wi-Fi 6 technology, enhancing wireless speeds and accommodating a larger number of connected devices. This new router is designed to cater to the needs of users seeking high-quality internet connectivity both at home and while traveling.

news.headline: Ibotta increases share repurchase program by $100 million for Class A common stock.
news.summary: In Denver, Ibotta, Inc. (NYSE: IBTA), the leading digital promotions network in North America, revealed an expansion to its share repurchase initiative. The company's Board of Directors sanctioned the purchase of up to an extra $100 million worth of its Class A common stock through the Share Repurchase Program, which has no set end date. Ibotta will acquire shares periodically under this program.

news.headline: Appriss Retail acquired by Gemspring Capital for unknown financial terms, eyes new growth opportunities.
news.summary: Appriss Retail in Irvine, California, known for aiding retailers in minimizing losses and combating fraud, has been acquired by a Gemspring Capital Management, LLC affiliate. Gemspring, a private equity firm operating out of Westport, Connecticut, offers tailored financial solutions. The specific financial details of the acquisition remain undisclosed.

news.headline: Good American expands to 36 Macy's stores for Spring 2025, plans to reach 79 stores by Fall 2025, increasing accessibility.
news.summary: New York - Good American, the international brand co-founded by Khloé Kardashian and Emma Grede, renowned for its progressive and all-encompassing denim designs, has made its debut at Macy’s in 36 locations for the Spring 2025 season. Further plans include extending to a total of 79 Macy’s stores from Fall 2025 onwards. This collaboration with Macy’s marks a pivotal milestone for the brand, widening its customer base significantly and providing greater access to Good American’s high-end denim and fashion choices.

news.headline: AES Corp initiates cash tender offer for all 3.300% Senior Notes due 2025. Details subject to terms.
news.summary: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, AES Corporation (NYSE: AES), revealed on March 12, 2025, the launch of a tender offer to acquire all of its outstanding 3.300% Senior Notes. The offer is for cash and is contingent on specific terms and conditions.

news.headline: Triad Partners appoints new CTO and COO to drive growth and innovation, reinforcing commitment to excellence. (Character count: 94)
news.summary: New leadership appointments at Triad Partners demonstrate the company's dedication to innovation, excellence, and continuous growth. Based in Lawrence, Kansas, the financial services organization aims to support advisors in achieving success, independence, and significance. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025, without specifying the number of new hires.

news.headline: German Chancellor Scholz on tariffs: Measures by the US government will impact the US most.
EU Council President Costa: If the US believes there is a real problem, the good way to solve this is to talk, we are open for this.
Wana Brands launches THC-infused sparkling hemp beverages in Total Wine & More stores nationwide, increasing consumer availability.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance consumer access to high-quality cannabis beverages, Wana Brands, a top edibles supplier in North America and a subsidiary of Canopy USA LLC, revealed a strategic partnership. As of March 12, 2025, Wana Beverages will now be more widely available for consumers. This collaboration aims to increase the reach of premium cannabis-infused drinks and cater to a larger customer base.

news.headline: Leaf Home partners with US Army PaYS Program to strengthen veteran hiring commitment. March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In Hudson, Ohio on March 12, 2025, Leaf Home, the top home improvement company in North America, revealed its involvement in the U.S. Army Partnership for Your Success (PaYS) Program. This move solidifies Leaf Home's dedication to recruiting and assisting Veterans. The partnership underscores Leaf Home's commitment to hiring Veterans, and the company's support for this cause.

news.headline: AES to offer senior notes in a public offering for undisclosed amount to raise funds for unspecified purposes.
news.summary: A corporation based in Arlington, Virginia, disclosed on March 12, 2025, its plans to proceed with a registered public offering to issue senior notes (referred to as the "Notes"), pending market conditions. The AES Corporation, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as AES under the ticker symbol AES, aims to utilize the resulting net proceeds for unspecified purposes.

news.headline: PBF Energy's subsidiary plans to offer $750 million in senior notes due 2030.
news.summary: Parsippany, New Jersey, March 12, 2025 - PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE:PBF) revealed that its subsidiary, PBF Holding Company LLC, plans to offer $750 million in senior bonds, contingent upon various factors including market conditions.

news.headline: Sheppard Mullin in New York hires Michael Malfettone to expand Energy team, focusing on Infrastructure and Project Finance.
news.summary: In recent news, Michael Malfettone has become a new addition to Sheppard Mullin's Energy, Infrastructure, and Project Finance team based in New York. This move brings valuable expertise to the team as they continue to expand their presence in the sector.

news.headline: Schneider sponsors Sleep Awareness Week to improve workforce sleep health, setting example for well-being. March 9-15, 2025.
news.summary: In an exemplary move towards prioritizing workforce well-being, Schneider has taken the initiative to sponsor the National Sleep Foundation's Sleep Awareness Week. Running from March 9th to March 15th, 2025, this event aims to raise awareness about the importance of sleep. The National Sleep Foundation expressed gratitude for Schneider's support, highlighting how such collaborations are essential in fostering a culture of health and well-being in the workplace.

news.headline: GoSecure, a leader in cybersecurity solutions, wins 8 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards in 2025.
news.summary: In San Diego on March 12, 2025, GoSecure, a prominent provider of managed extended detection and response (MXDR) and cybersecurity services, proudly received a total of eight esteemed 2025 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards. This accolade serves to underscore the company's exceptional performance in the industry.

news.headline: Stasher introduces new reusable Stretch Lids, a durable alternative to plastic wrap, revolutionizing food storage.
news.summary: Introducing Stasher Stretch Lids, a sustainable solution to single-use plastic wrap, by Stasher, a leading brand in reusable food storage products, based in Emeryville, Calif. Released on March 12, 2025, these lids mark a significant advancement for Stasher since 2016. The lids are designed to be more durable and reusable compared to traditional plastic wrap, offering a long-lasting alternative to consumers. This innovation caters to the growing demand for eco-friendly kitchen supplies and showcases Stasher's commitment to sustainability.

news.headline: TotalEnergies and RWE partner for largest green hydrogen deal in Germany, aiming to reduce CO2 emissions by 300K tons.
news.summary: Energy company TotalEnergies SE (NYSE:TTE) has partnered with developer RWE in a deal to provide 30,000 tons of green hydrogen per year to the Leuna refinery in Germany for a period of fifteen years, beginning in 2030. As part of this agreement, RWE will be responsible for building and running a 300 MW electrolyzer in Lingen to generate green hydrogen, which will be stored on-site before being transported through a 600 km pipeline to the Leuna refinery. This transition to green hydrogen is expected to result in a reduction of approximately 300,000 tons of CO2 emissions annually at the refinery starting in 2030. This deal signifies a significant milestone in the shift towards sustainable energy practices.

news.headline: WillScot plans to offer $500.0M in senior secured notes due 2030 through its subsidiary, Williams Scotsman, Inc.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, WillScot Holdings Corporation, a leading provider of temporary space solutions listed on Nasdaq under WSC, shared that its subsidiary Williams Scotsman, Inc. (WSI) intends to offer $500.0 million in senior secured notes due 2030, dependent on market conditions. These Notes, which will be WSI’s general second lien senior secured obligations, will be backed by guarantees from WSI’s domestic subsidiaries and its direct parent company, Williams Scotsman Holdings Corp., on a senior secured basis.

news.headline: Rheinmetall, a German arms manufacturer, achieved record sales in the era of rearmament, responding to Europe's increased military spending due to the Ukraine conflict.
news.summary: In response to the conflict in Ukraine, the company promptly adjusted its operations to cater to Europe's increasing demand for defense expenditure.

news.headline: Estée Lauder partners with Adobe using Firefly AI for digital marketing campaigns. Connects with consumers in 150+ countries.
news.summary: A partnership between Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) and The Estée Lauder Companies (NYSE:EL) was announced today in an effort to revolutionize digital marketing campaigns through the utilization of Adobe Firefly and generative AI. The Estée Lauder Companies, which includes renowned brands like Clinique, Estée Lauder, Jo Malone London, La Mer, and M•A•C Cosmetics, engages with consumers in approximately 150 countries and territories. This collaboration reflects a strategic shift in ELC's approach to launching campaigns.

news.headline: OM1 expands into Europe to support life sciences with AI-driven evidence solutions, improving healthcare decision-making.
news.summary: Boston-based company OM1, which specializes in real-world data (RWD) and AI-driven insights for the life sciences industry, has revealed its expansion into Europe. This move is aimed at bolstering support for pharmaceutical and healthcare firms with top-notch, AI-enhanced real-world evidence (RWE) solutions. The expansion signifies a key achievement for OM1 as it strives to enhance healthcare decision-making through offering more practical, data-backed insights across a broader geographical scope. This development reflects OM1's commitment to providing valuable support on an international scale and making a significant impact in the industry.

news.headline: Rafay and Netris collaborate to enhance GPU cloud infrastructure for AI, aiming to speed consumption & monetization.
news.summary: Two technology companies, Rafay Systems based in Sunnyvale, California, and Netris, have teamed up to revolutionize GPU cloud infrastructure for businesses looking to enhance their AI capabilities. Rafay specializes in providing Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) solutions for self-service compute consumption, while Netris is known for its expertise in networking automation, abstraction, and multi-tenancy for AI and cloud operators. By collaborating, they aim to fast-track the adoption and profitability of GPU-based services for companies striving to integrate AI technologies. This strategic partnership will prove beneficial for enterprises seeking to leverage AI applications, ensuring a smoother transition to advanced computing solutions.

news.headline: Fractional AI offers Generative AI Diligence service for PE deals in M&A transactions, assessing risks and opportunities.
news.summary: Headquartered in San Francisco, Fractional AI, a company specializing in custom generative AI solutions, has introduced a new service aimed at aiding private equity firms and enterprises in assessing generative AI implications during M&A deals. The service, named generative artificial intelligence diligence, is tailored to evaluate risks, opportunities, and strategic advantages associated with generative AI technologies. This offering represents Fractional AI's progression in the industry, equipping investors with essential insights.

news.headline: MGID launches AI tool CTR Guard improving viewable CTR by 29%, combating ad fatigue, enhancing ad performance.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, MGID revealed the debut of CTR Guard, an advanced AI tool aimed at addressing ad fatigue and boosting digital ad effectiveness.

news.headline: Marchex to participate in 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17, 2025 at Laguna Cliffs Marriott in Dana Point, CA.
news.summary: Seattle-based company Marchex, Inc. (NASDAQ: MCHX) revealed that their management team will be present at the 37th Annual Roth Conference on Monday, March 17, 2025, at the Laguna Cliffs Marriott in Dana Point, CA. The team will participate in one-on-one sessions. Marchex leverages artificial intelligence and conversational intelligence to boost revenue growth and align enterprise strategies. For further details, reach out to Roth Capita.

news.headline: RegASK launches Agentic AI Regulatory Workflow Orchestration Solution to streamline processes for regulatory teams.
news.summary: An innovative AI-driven regulatory intelligence company, RegASK, has recently introduced a groundbreaking Agentic AI-powered solution that automates the creation of regulatory alerts and orchestrates workflows. This new product is particularly beneficial for regulatory affairs and compliance teams as it simplifies complex processes, minimizes manual tasks, and enhances their ability to effectively navigate the regulatory environment. With regulatory teams often overwhelmed by numerous updates and reporting requirements, this solution is designed to alleviate their workload and improve efficiency.

news.headline: ServiceNow's new platform release boosts AI agents across CRM, HR, IT, for faster workflows. Thousands of agents added.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, ServiceNow has announced its latest platform release which introduces thousands of AI agents across various departments including CRM, HR, and IT, among others. This update aims to enhance the efficiency and automation of processes within organizations.

news.headline: vFunction partners with AWS ISV Accelerate Program, offering software solutions for enterprise modernization.
news.summary: A technology company based in Menlo Park, California, called vFunction has recently become a member of the AWS ISV Accelerate Program. This program is a co-sell initiative for AWS Partners offering software solutions that either operate on or are compatible with AWS.

news.headline: Arista Networks unveils new AI networking features for enhanced performance. CLB in Arista EOS boosts workload performance with low-latency flows. CV UNO provides job-centric observability for troubleshooting.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET) announced new features aimed at enhancing AI cluster performance. The company introduced Cluster Load Balancing (CLB) within Arista EOS® to optimize AI workload performance through reliable, low-latency network flows. Additionally, Arista CloudVision® Universal Network Observability™ (CV UNO™) now provides AI job-centric observability, aiding in improved troubleshooting and swift issue identification. These advancements aim to maximize efficiency and performance within AI clusters.

news.headline: 42% of Canadian businesses are unsure about tariffs, leading to a two-speed economy with financial pressures.
news.summary: In Toronto, Canadian businesses are facing a challenging economic landscape, referred to as a “two-speed economy,” as per Float’s recent report on Canadian SMB Financial Outlook 2025. The report, based on a survey of over 400 small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs), reveals a concerning trend of a growing divergence between established businesses focusing on expansion and newer businesses grappling with financial limitations that hinder their progress. Despite a generally stable business confidence, the study indicates a noticeable contrast in the financial trajectories of businesses, with some thriving and others barely surviving due to economic pressures.

news.headline: Innovaccer released a 360-degree Gap Closure Solution for Payers to streamline risk adjustment and quality, aiding in boosting member outcomes.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Innovaccer Inc., a prominent Healthcare AI company, introduced its new 360-Degree Gap Closure Solution for Payers. This integrated solution aims to assist health plans in improving risk adjustment and quality care. The launch is significant as CMS increases regulatory scrutiny and the shift towards value-based care quickens. The 360-Degree Gap Closure Solution allows payers to improve coding accuracy and elevate member outcomes during this crucial period.

news.headline: Marstone's digital tool now open to 175,000 Elevations Credit Union members, aiming to simplify investment management with clear language and visuals, low entry barrier.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, the investment management platform offered by Marstone, Inc., has been made accessible to more than 175,000 members of Elevations Credit Union, spanning across New York and Boulder, Co. Marstone's platform offers straightforward language and visuals, automated processes, ongoing portfolio tracking, and requires a low initial investment, making it user-friendly for individuals looking to venture into investing. The collaboration between Elevations and Marstone is rooted in a mutual goal of promoting widespread access to financial well-being. Elevations Credit Union's dedication to serving its members is underscored by this initiative.

news.headline: VTS shifts investment focus to AI-driven property software, scaling data & AI capabilities rapidly. Launches VTS Activate & VTS 4.
news.summary: VTS, based in New York, announced a strategic investment shift towards its core leasing and property software. The company is scaling up its data backbone and AI capabilities. VTS Activate, a TenEx and Property Management platform, has been a recent successful launch. VTS 4 is also gaining traction as the industry's sole platform with [important numbers] earlier this year, marking a significant step towards enhancing the real estate ecosystem.

news.headline: Propel Software survey shows consumer reliance on medical devices, highlights importance through survey of 2,000 Americans.
news.summary: A California-based company, Propel Software, known for its innovative product value management (PVM) platform, has recently unveiled findings from a survey focusing on consumer medical devices. The survey, conducted by Talker Research and commissioned by Propel Software, involved 2,000 participants across the United States. These results shed light on the crucial role medical devices play in consumers' lives, with a focus on how they rely on these devices for vital insights aiding in the diagnosis of health conditions.

news.headline: Rebistork rebrands as REBEL, expanding into home goods to address $1 trillion retail returns crisis. #recommerce #sustainability
news.summary: Introducing its new brand identity, REBEL, the company previously known as Rebelstork is now reflecting a broader focus beyond baby gear. This shift aims to address and resolve the $1 trillion retail returns crisis. The rebrand comes as REBEL emerges as the sole venture-backed, certified B-Corporation recommerce platform. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Mitsubishi Tanabe will present 11 research abstracts on ALS at 2025 MDA Conference in Jersey City. #research #ALS #MTPA
news.summary: In Jersey City, New Jersey on March 12, 2025, Mitsubishi Tanabe Pharma America, Inc. (MTPA) disclosed the unveiling of eleven abstracts focusing on research in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) at the 2025 Muscular Dystrophy Association (MDA) Clinical and Scientific Conference.

news.headline: QuamCore secures $9M seed funding to develop scalable 1M qubit quantum computer, promising breakthrough in large-scale quantum computing.
news.summary: QuamCore, a deep tech startup based in Herzliya, Israel, made a significant advancement in superconducting digital logic that eliminates quantum scaling challenges. This breakthrough promises to revolutionize large-scale quantum computing. The company's announcement on March 12, 2025, marked its emergence in this field. This development opens the door for quantum computing on a massive scale and has the potential to reshape the industry.

news.headline: Hershey's Chocolate World in Hershey, PA offers spring activities with new treats starting March 15.
news.summary: Starting from March 15, chocolate enthusiasts of every age will have the chance to indulge in a variety of new and returning treats and activities at Hershey's Chocolate World in HERSHEY, Pa. The egg-citing lineup of events will offer a delightful experience for visitors. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025, through PRNewswire. This spring, be sure to visit for a wide range of delectable options and online offerings that cater to all chocolate lovers.

news.headline: Pentera, a leader in security validation, raised $60M in funding to drive growth, aiming to surpass $200M in ARR.
news.summary: Pentera, a frontrunner in the Automated Cyber Security Validation sector, has secured $60 million in Series D funding led by Evolution Equity. The funding injection comes as Pentera strives to accelerate its growth trajectory, aiming to surpass $200 million in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR). Known for its prowess in automated security validation, the company's focus on innovation and expansion is propelling its success in the market.

news.headline: Silicon Motion debuts PCIe Gen5 Enterprise SSD Kit with 128TB capacity at China Flash Market Summit 2025.
news.summary: At the China Flash Market Summit 2025, a technology company showcased its latest achievement - a 128TB SSD design. The event took place in Taipei and Milpitas, Calif., on March 12, 2025. Silicon Motion Technology Corporation (NasdaqGS: SIMO), a prominent player in NAND flash controller design and marketing, was behind this groundbreaking innovation.

news.headline: Skyscanner's new feature saves travelers up to $435 on flights, revealing Wednesdays as prime for price drops.
news.summary: Skyscanner has released data indicating that Wednesdays see the highest rate of airfare drops, with travelers able to save a minimum of 20% daily. The information was unveiled in Miami on March 12, 2025. Alongside this news, Skyscanner introduced a novel app feature aimed at inspiring travelers.

news.headline: FLOR expands Trina Turk X FLOR Collection with four new styles in Spring Launch.
news.summary: In Atlanta, FLOR recently unveiled its latest Spring Collection which includes four new styles developed in partnership with Trina Turk. This collaboration marks an exciting addition to FLOR's offerings.

news.headline: Ryan receives Early Talent Award from Handshake, #1 college-to-career network in U.S. Important stats: Handshake, 2025.
news.summary: In Dallas, Ryan, a top global provider of tax services and software, received an Early Talent Award from Handshake, the primary college-to-career network in the U.S. President Americas and COO Ginny Kissling expressed the importance of recruiting early talent for innovation in tax and software, highlighting the company's commitment to offering significant opportunities and mentorship for recent graduates. This recognition underscores the firm's dedication to nurturing new talent in these industries.

news.headline: Group14 Technologies appoints ex-Stellantis CFO Richard K. Palmer to its board of directors on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In Woodinville, Washington on March 12, 2025, Group14 Technologies, the leading global producer and provider of advanced silicon battery materials, revealed the addition of Richard K. Palmer to its board of directors. Palmer brings with him a wealth of financial knowledge and experience to the company. Group14 Technologies is recognized as the largest supplier of advanced silicon battery materials worldwide.

news.headline: Eurofins introduces first Commodity Chemical Testing service for softlines industries, overcoming challenges, and supporting MRSL compliance.
news.summary: Eurofins Sustainability Services in Boston has expanded its service offerings to include commodity chemical testing for the softlines industries, catering to retailers, brands, and manufacturers of consumer products. This innovative methodology addresses the testing challenges posed by commodity chemicals, making it the pioneer service aiding in MRSL compliance. With this latest addition, Eurofins now provides a comprehensive range of services to ensure the quality and safety of consumer products.

news.headline: CaPow will unveil Genesis Antenna XL at ProMat 2025 for robotic fleets, offering extended energy coverage to minimize downtime.
news.summary: In Be'er Sheva, Israel, on March 12, 2025, CaPow introduced an extended coverage modular floor antenna designed to keep AMRs and AGVs in an energy-positive state. This innovation eliminates downtime and maximizes operational efficiency for robotic fleets. CaPow, the provider of Genesis, has developed this solution to ensure continuous power delivery for robots, helping them remain operational at all times. The technology aims to enhance productivity and reduce disruptions by keeping the automated machines powered up efficiently.
